name: EmojiPicker

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment:
Most of the messages are handled internally, but there are a couple that will
be of interest to the parent module:

`Toggle`: Use this message in the parent to toggle the emoji picker on and off
`Select`: Catch this message in the parent to retrieve the selected emoji

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment:
The internal state of the emoji picker.

Note: the `skinColor` field is not in use in the current version,
but a future release may include a skin tone selector to switch between
emoji variants.
aliases.type: { activeCategory : Emojis.Category, closeOnSelect : Basics.Bool, customEmojis : List.List Emojis.Emoji, customEmojisHeight : Maybe.Maybe String.String, customEmojisWidth : Maybe.Maybe String.String, hidden : Basics.Bool, offsetX : Basics.Float, offsetY : Basics.Float, searchText : String.String, skinColor : EmojiPicker.SkinColor }

aliases.name: PickerConfig
aliases.comment:
When initializing the emoji picker, you'll need to provide a few
configuration parameters.

`offsetX`: the horizontal offset from where the picker is declared
`offsetY`: the vertical offset from where the picker is declared
`closeOnSelect`: whether or not the close the picker after an emoji is selected
`customEmojis`: a list of emojis you would like to add to the custom category
aliases.type: { offsetX : Basics.Float, offsetY : Basics.Float, closeOnSelect : Basics.Bool, customEmojis : List.List Emojis.Emoji, customEmojisHeight : Maybe.Maybe String.String, customEmojisWidth : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

values.name: init
values.comment:
This is the function to call to initialize the emoji picker.

    pickerConfig : PickerConfig
    pickerConfig =
        { offsetX = -271
        , offsetY = -410
        , closeOnSelect = True
        }

    emojiModel : EmojiPicker.Model
    emojiModel =
        EmojiPicker.init pickerConfig

values.name: update
values.comment:
You'll need to catch the `Select` message in your parent module to
obtain the emoji from the picker. However, don't forget to propagate the
messages down to this function, because some internal states will probably
need to be updated.

values.name: view
values.comment: Use this function to instantiate the actual `Html msg` for the picker.

name: Emojis
comment:
This module provides a list of emojis indexed by shortcode/names

@docs Category, Emoji, emojiDict

aliases.name: Category
aliases.comment:
typedef for a category of emojis. in the
main file, we render emojis by category.
aliases.type: { id : String.String, name : String.String, emojis : List.List String.String }

aliases.name: Emoji
aliases.comment: final data structure for an emoji
aliases.type: { name : String.String, native : String.String, sortOrder : Basics.Int, skinVariations : Dict.Dict String.String String.String, keywords : List.List String.String, imgUrl : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

values.name: emojiDict
values.comment: dict containing all the emojis indexed by shortcode

name: Icons
comment:
This module provides emojis by category

@docs activity, flags, foods, iconList, nature, objects, people, places, symbols

values.name: iconList
values.type: List.List Emojis.Emoji -> List.List ( Emojis.Category, Svg.Attribute msg -> Html.Html msg )
